source.name: frames.ag (AgentWallet)
source.description: AgentWallet: server wallets para agentes com signing server-side, policies e proxy de pagamentos x402 (fetch).

skills.name: agentwallet
skills.description: Wallets para agentes com signing server-side e policies. Inclui x402/fetch (one-step payment proxy) para pagar e chamar APIs com retry e dedupe.
